docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY PROKHORENKO OLEG AS TO DEFENDANT VAN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROKHORENKO OLEG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAN, DAVID $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,046.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VAN, DAVID
